title: Margie Nguyen
compiled_truth: Margie Nguyen is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2001-01-22 to 2001-12-06), Margie Nguyen sent 8 and received 26 emails, totalling 34 interactions. Top correspondents: [John Griffith](people/john-griffith) (6), [Jeremy Wong](people/jeremy-wong) (3), [Sanjeev Gupta](people/sanjeev-gupta) (2), [Chris Abel](people/chris-abel) (2), [Thomas Araujo](people/thomas-araujo) (2). Mailbox folders observed: central, deleted_items, market.
